News Verification : The media had reports that Maruti Suzuki India Limited  is in pact to buy on lease right of Navi Mumbai land from RPG Life Sciences Limited . The Exchange, in order to verify the accuracy or otherwise of the information reported in the media and to inform the market place so that the interest of the investors is safeguarded, had written to the company. Maruti Suzuki India Limited has vide its letter inter-alia stated, "That Maruti Suzuki India Limited(MSIL) had entered into a Memorandum of Understanding(MOU) with RPG Life Sciences Ltd. in August 2012 for acquiring leasehold rights through Deed of Assignment in respect of land measuring 14148.90 sq.mtr. out of total land admeasuring 48632 sq.mtr. falling under Plot No. 25&25A situated at Trans-Thane Creek Industrial Area (T.T.C. Industrial Area) within the village limit of Pawne and within the limits of Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation, Taluka & Registration Sub District- Thane and Registration District- Thane Maharashtra together with any structure viz. Process Development Lab Standing thereon.This MOU is subject to conclusion on fulfillment of terms and conditions mentioned therein. That as part of legal due diligence, MSIL has, through its advocate Mr. D.C. Daga, released a Public Notice today in certain newspapers seeking comments and objections from any person to the proposed transaction. That MSIL is seeking to acquire this land for setting up 'Regional Office' facilities in the Mumbai Region in due course. That setting up 'Regional Office' facilities in various regions of the country is in the ordinary course of business of MSIL and in no way affects materially its operations."
